title: Billing Dashboard
subtitle: View token usage, model cost, and billing trends from upstream APIs

onboarding.title: Configure relay key
onboarding.stepCreateKey: Register or sign in on the relay platform, then create a user API key
onboarding.stepConfigureProvider: Return to CentaurAI, add an upstream service in model settings, and enter Base URL plus API Key
onboarding.noSession: CentaurAI does not store relay account passwords or login sessions; it only uses the configured key for upstream APIs
